label: CIS Safeguard 4.3
title: Configure Automatic Session Locking on Enterprise Assets

prose.en: Configure automatic session locking on enterprise assets after a defined period of inactivity. For general purpose operating systems, the period must not exceed 15 minutes. For mobile end-user devices, the period must not exceed 2 minutes.
Automatic session locking is configured on enterprise assets after a defined period of inactivity.
For general purpose operating systems, the period does not exceed 15 minutes.
For mobile end-user devices, the period does not exceed two (2) minutes.
